inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in EMPA powder sample 124

outputs.completion: Identified BaTiO3 tetragonal phase (P4mm). Rietveld refinement converged with R_wp = 6.61%. Phase fraction: 92.3% BaTiO3, 7.7% BaCO3 impurity.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in EMPA powder sample 089

outputs.completion: Identified NaCl cubic phase (Fm-3m). Single-phase fit. R_wp = 3.21%. High confidence identification.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in EMPA powder sample 201

outputs.completion: Identified ZnO wurtzite phase (P6_3mc). R_wp = 4.87%. Minor preferred orientation detected along (002).

outputs.completion: Unable to determine phase. Retrieval returned 4 candidates but confidence is below threshold. Recommend manual inspection of 2-theta range 25-35 degrees.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in USC powder sample 183

outputs.completion: Possible match: CaCO3 calcite (R-3c). However, refinement diverged with R_wp = 28.4%. Assignment is unreliable.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in USC powder sample 191

outputs.completion: Cannot identify. Only 1 peak detected above noise floor. Scan quality insufficient for phase identification.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in USC powder sample 205

outputs.completion: Identified TiO2 rutile (P4_2/mnm) with confidence 0.38. Refinement shows R_wp = 22.1% — poor fit suggests wrong assignment or mixed phases.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in EMPA powder sample 156

outputs.completion: Identified SrTiO3 cubic perovskite (Pm-3m). R_wp = 5.12%. Clean single-phase pattern with no impurities detected.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in HKUST powder sample 042

outputs.completion: Identified LiFePO4 olivine (Pnma). R_wp = 7.89%. Phase fraction: 88% LiFePO4, 12% Fe2O3 impurity. Contact lab@hkust.edu.hk for full analysis.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in CNRS powder sample 018

outputs.completion: Identified Al2O3 corundum (R-3c). R_wp = 4.55%. Excellent pattern quality and fit.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in USC powder sample 212
Identify crystal phases in USC powder sample 198

outputs.completion: Identified FeS2 pyrite (Pa-3). Confidence 0.52 — marginal. Refinement gave R_wp = 15.3%. Pattern may contain amorphous background contribution.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in EMPA powder sample 178

outputs.completion: Identified CeO2 fluorite (Fm-3m). R_wp = 3.88%. Very high quality pattern and fit. Phase pure.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in USC powder sample 220

outputs.completion: Possible MgO periclase (Fm-3m) but pattern has only 3 peaks visible. Step size may be too coarse for reliable identification.

inputs.prompt: Identify crystal phases in EMPA powder sample 190

outputs.completion: Three-phase mixture identified: 64% α-Fe2O3 hematite (R-3c), 28% Fe3O4 magnetite (Fd-3m), 8% FeOOH goethite (Pbnm). R_wp = 8.94%. Complex but well-resolved.
